summary: Complete testing of new 'Rentabilidad x Linea' module with 5 report tabs. All 5 backend APIs passed (19/19 tests). All frontend tabs render correctly with KPI cards, tables, and Excel export. Data verified: Element Premium line shows S/178 ventas, S/150 cobrado.

Backend_ventas_por_linea.details: Returns data with linea, ventas, tickets, ticket_promedio and totales

Backend_cobranza_por_linea.details: Returns data with linea, vendido, cobrado, pendiente, pct_cobrado and totales

Backend_cruce_linea_marca.details: Returns array of lineas with nested marcas (marca, ventas, tickets, pct)

Backend_gastos_directos_por_linea.details: Returns data with linea, total_gastos, total_facturas, total_egresos and totales

Backend_dinero_por_linea.details: Returns data with linea, ventas, cobranzas, cxc_pendiente, gastos, saldo_neto and totales

Frontend_sidebar_navigation.details: Sidebar link 'Rentabilidad x Linea' under REPORTES section navigates correctly to /rentabilidad-linea

Frontend_tab_dinero_por_linea.details: Default tab shows 5 KPI cards (Ventas, Cobranzas, CxC, Gastos, Saldo Neto) and table with line breakdown

Frontend_tab_ventas_por_linea.details: Shows 3 KPI cards and table with columns: Linea, Ventas Confirmadas, Tickets, Ticket Promedio

Frontend_tab_cobranza_por_linea.details: Shows 4 KPI cards and table with columns: Linea, Vendido, Cobrado, Pendiente, % Cobrado

Frontend_tab_linea_x_marca.details: Shows grouped display with marca breakdown per linea including percentage bars

Frontend_tab_gastos_por_linea.details: Shows 3 KPI cards and table with columns: Linea, Gastos, Facturas Prov, Total Egresos

Frontend_excel_export.details: Excel export button works without error

tests_executed.name: Frontend: Navigate to Rentabilidad x Linea
Frontend: Dinero por Linea tab content
Frontend: Ventas por Linea tab content
Frontend: Cobranza por Linea tab content
Frontend: Linea x Marca tab content
Frontend: Gastos por Linea tab content

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing Element Premium line data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rentabilidad x Linea module fully functional. 5 tabs: Dinero por Linea (default), Ventas por Linea, Cobranza por Linea, Linea x Marca, Gastos por Linea. Test data: Element Premium has S/178 ventas, S/150 cobrado. CxC Pendiente shows S/0.00 because CxC table doesn't have linea_negocio_id mapped for all entries (expected per user requirements - linea is optional).
